Event: Magic Training - Treewing
Event Date: 28/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM305
Treewing Tamer Amulet

When the amulet wearer sets an enemy on fire or incinerates them, they remove 4 random negative effects and gain a shield that blocks 3 attacks and exists up to 4 sec. Stacks 2 times. The ability triggers once per 2 sec.

Once in a while, the unit starts incinerating 3 random enemy units for 4 sec. The enemy units receive 250000 pure damage every second for 4 sec., and all enemy units in a small radius around the enemy units being incinerated receive pure damage equal to 75% of the damage received by the original targets. Once the incineration wears off, the ability's targets are weakened. Their maximum health, fortitude, physical and magic armor are reduced by 50% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Magic Training - Treewing

Event date: 28/12/2025

Sage bot code: AM305

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
